name: @gonext/rum-beacon
description: GoNext in-house RUM beacon. Subscribes to Core Web Vitals via the `web-vitals` library, batches them in a 5-second window, and ships them to a first-party beacon endpoint via navigator.sendBeacon (with a fetch fallback for browsers without the API). Designed to be inlined into the public theme as a tiny module script. Apache-2.0. Issue #132.

scripts.build: echo '@gonext/rum-beacon: source-only package, no build step'
